description: Classification of code repositories by functional security domain. Repositories may carry multiple domain tags. Derived from the NoDataFound portfolio classification system.

predicates.description: The functional security domain a repository belongs to.

entry.description: Exploit development, red team tooling, vulnerability research, fuzzing, payload generation, C2 frameworks, post-exploitation.
Detection engineering, SIEM rules, YARA signatures, incident response tooling, forensics, blue team automation.
CTI platform tooling, indicator management, STIX/TAXII, threat feeds, actor tracking, campaign analysis, IOC enrichment.
Adversarial ML, LLM security, AI red teaming, model exploitation, AI-powered security tools, prompt injection, model poisoning.
Hardware hacking, SDR, RF analysis, firmware reversing, embedded systems, IoT exploitation.
Malware analysis, reverse engineering, unpacking, deobfuscation, sandbox analysis, behavioral analysis.
Open source intelligence collection, reconnaissance automation, data mining, domain/IP enumeration.
Infrastructure automation, CI/CD, container orchestration, cloud security, IaC, monitoring, deployment tooling.
Data visualization, dashboards, reporting tools, graph analysis, network visualization, threat landscape mapping.
Conference talks, CTF challenges, training materials, workshops, community tools, educational content.
Cryptocurrency research, blockchain analysis, smart contract auditing, DeFi security, financial fraud detection.
CVE research, vulnerability discovery, PoC development, patch analysis, advisory writing, responsible disclosure.
Privacy tools, anti-surveillance tech, anonymization, adversarial fashion, counter-tracking, anti-fingerprinting.
Policy enforcement, compliance automation, SBOM/AIBOM generation, audit tooling, standards validation, repo governance.
